allow: Bash(python -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(p, encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\) for p in ['app/api/voice.py', 'app/services/voice_service.py']]; print\('OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(m['name'], m['size']//1e9, 'GB'\) for m in data.get\('models',[]\)]")
Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('main.py'\).read\(\)\); print\('main.py OK'\); ast.parse\(open\('app/api/widget_embed.py'\).read\(\)\); print\('widget_embed.py OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('app/api/widget.py'\).read\(\)\); print\('widget.py OK'\); ast.parse\(open\('app/api/widget_embed.py'\).read\(\)\); print\('widget_embed.py OK'\)")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-WmiObject Win32_VideoController | Select-Object Name, AdapterRAM | Format-List")
Bash(venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from app.core.config import settings; print\('Provider:', settings.LLM_PROVIDER\); print\('Model:', settings.LLM_MODEL\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); info=d.get\('model_info',{}\); print\('Params:', info.get\('general.parameter_count', 'unknown'\)\); det=d.get\('details',{}\); print\('Quant:', det.get\('quantization_level','?'\)\); print\('Size:', det.get\('parameter_size','?'\)\)")
